highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.116.1 corrects the NuGet PackagePath and updates the Android NDK to r27c with 16 KB alignment.

bullets.lead: Android NDK r27c and 16 KB alignment
bullets.detail: Updates the Android NDK to r27c and switches to 16 KB page alignment for Android 15 compatibility.

harfbuzz_summary: Picks up the corrected NuGet PackagePath and the Android NDK r27c / 16 KB alignment update in the HarfBuzzSharp binding.
